title: Publish Audio without Making Listening Mandatory
summary: Native audio controls provide established playback behavior. Multiple source elements can offer compatible formats, fallback content supports browsers that cannot play them, and a full transcript gives equivalent access to the spoken information without requiring sound. Predict, inspect, explain, and apply the contract in a cumulative public-information build.
objectives: Explain html audio with source and browser evidence.
Apply html audio without discarding earlier document work.
Diagnose the named misconception in a changed public-service scenario.
